assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: The model explicitly places 'Upgrade the GKE Control Plane' as Phase 2, prior to upgrading any of the node pools in Phases 3, 4, and 5.

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: The model provides a clear order (Coordinating -> Master -> Data) and provides logical rationale for each step.

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: The model explicitly mentions that regional pd-ssd volumes are replicated across two zones and can attach instantly if a pod is scheduled in the other zone.

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: The model recommends a PDB with maxUnavailable: 1 for master nodes, explicitly stating this ensures 2 out of 3 masters are up to maintain quorum.

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: The model explicitly recommends setting the GKE node pool upgrade strategy to maxSurge: 1 and maxUnavailable: 0 for all node pools.

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: The model advises monitoring health during the upgrades and waiting for green at the very end, but does not explicitly instruct the user to verify a 'green' status strictly between each node pool upgrade.

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: The model does not mention the PV reclaim policy or the 'Retain' setting.

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: The model includes curl commands for Elasticsearch API interactions but lacks any kubectl commands for checking the StatefulSet rollout status.

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: The model includes taking an Elasticsearch snapshot as step 4 of the preparation phase, complete with the curl command.
